prompt: In a brightly lit, modern glass-walled boardroom overlooking a sprawling futuristic cityscape, a high-stakes startup pitch is taking place. Standing confidently at the head of the sleek mahogany table, an Asian female CEO is pointing at a glowing holographic projection of a new architectural design. Sitting to her left, a Black male investor in a sharp navy blue suit is leaning forward, listening intently with his hands steepled. On the right side of the table, a Caucasian male software engineer wearing a casual grey sweater is rapidly typing notes on a transparent tablet. The room is filled with tension, ambition, and the soft hum of advanced technology.

Inside a warm, rustic indie coffee shop filled with the rich aroma of freshly roasted espresso beans and baked pastries, a diverse group of people are enjoying a rainy afternoon. Behind the wooden counter, a Hispanic female barista wearing a dark green apron is skillfully pouring latte art into a ceramic mug. Leaning against the counter, a Middle Eastern male customer in a stylish leather jacket is smiling and waiting for his order. In the background, sitting in a plush velvet armchair near a rain-streaked window, an Indian female student is deeply engrossed in a thick hardcover novel, a steaming cup of tea resting on the small table beside her.

High up on a rugged, snow-capped mountain trail surrounded by towering pine trees and breathtaking alpine vistas, a group of adventurous hikers are taking a brief rest. Standing on a large granite boulder, a Caucasian female expedition leader in a bright red parka is carefully studying a topographical map. A few steps behind her, an Asian male photographer with a heavy backpack is adjusting the lens of his professional camera to capture the stunning valley below. Sitting on a fallen log nearby, a Black female climber in yellow thermal gear is drinking water from a metal canteen, catching her breath in the crisp, freezing mountain air.

Deep in the neon-drenched, rain-slicked lower levels of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity, a vibrant and chaotic night market is in full swing. Behind a steaming metal food cart covered in glowing holographic menus, an Indian male vendor with a cybernetic arm is rapidly tossing noodles in a blazing wok. Standing across from the cart, a Caucasian female mercenary with glowing blue synthetic eyes and a dark trench coat is handing over a digital credit chip. Leaning against a nearby graffiti-covered brick wall, a Hispanic male hacker with a glowing neural interface on his temple is secretly monitoring the transaction through his augmented reality glasses.

In the fast-paced, brightly illuminated emergency room of a state-of-the-art metropolitan hospital, a dedicated medical team is working seamlessly together to save lives. Standing over a critical patient, a Black female trauma surgeon in sterile blue scrubs is issuing rapid, precise instructions while examining a glowing X-ray monitor. Standing right beside her, an Asian female nurse is swiftly preparing a tray of surgical instruments and syringes. Rushing through the sliding glass doors in the background, a Middle Eastern male paramedic in a high-visibility yellow uniform is pushing a stretcher, his face showing intense focus and urgency.
